TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kamu_nu_Macitun, title = kamu_nu_Macitun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kamu_nu_Macitun} }

S.FORM: kamu nu Macitun sapuelac kamu nu Macitun mikitinay tu nu kamu nu Selafu , unu kuwanay a kamu nu Macitun kanatal. kamu nu Macitun masaungay i Sayerweiya,Arepaniya,Paocyaliya,Sila,Seroweiniya,Keloaysiya,atu itiza i Satipan-Oco,Saamisan-Amilika, atu Aotaliya, musakamu nu Macitun a binacadan a tademaw. maka 200 a mang a tademaw musakamu tu kamu nu Macitun. kamu nu Macitun misaungay tu sulit-bacu nu Sayerweiya-Silier. u salaylay a kamu nu Yino . ayzaay a kamu nu Macitun caay kalecad tu naayaway a kamu nu Macitun. tuzuma i sa , malecad tu kamu nu Pacyaliya sa tu taw. u sulit nu kamu nu Macitun uzuma musakamu tuniyan a kamu kya kanatal atu subal: Macitun,Arpaniya,Paocyaliya,Sila subal: Parekan pangkiw-subal musakamuay a tademaw: 1500000-2000000 a tademaw u bacu nu kamu: iso639-1-mk; iso639-2-mac,mkd; iso639-3-mkd malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan wikipayke kamu nu Macitun-ť¶¨ŚÖ∂ť†ďŤ™ě wikipayke kamu nu Macitun-Macedonian language(Amilika a kamu) Ethnologue report for Macedonian BBC Education - Languages: Macedonian, Makedonski The Macedonian Language Reading and Pronouncing Macedonian: An Interactive Tutorial Otto Kronsteiner. The Collapse of Yugoslavia and the Future Prospects of the Macedonian Literary Language UCLA Language materials project Krste Misirkov - Za Makedonckite Raboti
S.PHON: kamu nu ma ¶itun sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kamu nu ma ¶itun mikitinaj tu nu kamu nu s…ôr~…ĺafu , unu kuwanaj a kamu nu ma ¶itun kanatar~…ĺ. kamu nu ma ¶itun masauŇčaj i saj…ôrw…ôija,ar…ôpanija,pao ¶jar~…ĺija,sir~…ĺa,s…ôrow…ôinija,k…ôr~…ĺoajsija,atu itiza i satipan-o ¶o,saamisan-amir~…ĺika, atu aotar~…ĺija, musakamu nu ma ¶itun a bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw. maka *** a maŇč a tad…ômaw musakamu tu kamu nu ma ¶itun. kamu nu ma ¶itun misauŇčaj tu sur~…ĺit-ba ¶u nu saj…ôrw…ôija-sir~…ĺi…ôr. u sar~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a kamu nu jino . ajzaaj a kamu nu ma ¶itun ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu naajawaj a kamu nu ma ¶itun. tuzuma i sa , mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kamu nu pa ¶jar~…ĺija sa tu taw. u sur~…ĺit nu kamu nu ma ¶itun uzuma musakamu tunijan a kamu kja kanatar~…ĺ atu subar~…ĺ: ma ¶itun,arpanija,pao ¶jar~…ĺija,sir~…ĺa subar~…ĺ: par…ôkan paŇčkiw-subar~…ĺ musakamuaj a tad…ômaw: *******-******* a tad…ômaw u ba ¶u nu kamu: iso***-*-mk; iso***-*-ma ¶,mkd; iso***-*-mkd mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan wikipajk…ô kamu nu ma ¶itun-**** wikipajk…ô kamu nu ma ¶itun-ma ¶…ôdonian r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô(amir~…ĺika a kamu) …ôtńßnor~…ĺogu…ô r…ôport for ma ¶…ôdonian bb ¶ …ôdu ¶ation - r~…ĺaŇčuag…ôs: ma ¶…ôdonian, mak…ôdonski tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô *…ôadiŇč and pronoun ¶iŇč ma ¶…ôdonian: an int…ôra ¶ti*…ô tutoriar~…ĺ otto kronst…ôin…ôr. tńß…ô ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺaps…ô of jugosr~…ĺa*ia and tńß…ô futur…ô prosp…ô ¶ts of tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian r~…ĺit…ôrarj r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô u ¶r~…ĺa r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô mat…ôriar~…ĺs proj…ô ¶t krst…ô misirko* - za mak…ôdon ¶kit…ô *aboti
S.FORM: kamu nu Macitun sapuelac kamu nu Macitun mikitinay tu nu kamu nu Selafu , unu kuwanay a kamu nu Macitun kanatal. kamu nu Macitun masaungay i Sayerweiya,Arepaniya,Paocyaliya,Sila,Seroweiniya,Keloaysiya,atu itiza i Satipan-Oco,Saamisan-Amilika, atu Aotaliya, musakamu nu Macitun a binacadan a tademaw. maka 200 a mang a tademaw musakamu tu kamu nu Macitun. kamu nu Macitun misaungay tu sulit-bacu nu Sayerweiya-Silier. u salaylay a kamu nu Yino . ayzaay a kamu nu Macitun caay kalecad tu naayaway a kamu nu Macitun. tuzuma i sa , malecad tu kamu nu Pacyaliya sa tu taw. u sulit nu kamu nu Macitun uzuma musakamu tuniyan a kamu kya kanatal atu subal: Macitun,Arpaniya,Paocyaliya,Sila subal: Parekan pangkiw-subal musakamuay a tademaw: 1500000-2000000 a tademaw u bacu nu kamu: iso639-1-mk; iso639-2-mac,mkd; iso639-3-mkd malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan wikipayke kamu nu Macitun-ť¶¨ŚÖ∂ť†ďŤ™ě wikipayke kamu nu Macitun-Macedonian language(Amilika a kamu) Ethnologue report for Macedonian BBC Education - Languages: Macedonian, Makedonski The Macedonian Language Reading and Pronouncing Macedonian: An Interactive Tutorial Otto Kronsteiner. The Collapse of Yugoslavia and the Future Prospects of the Macedonian Literary Language UCLA Language materials project Krste Misirkov - Za Makedonckite Raboti
S.PHON: kamu nu ma ¶itun sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kamu nu ma ¶itun mikitinaj tu nu kamu nu s…ôr~…ĺafu , unu kuwanaj a kamu nu ma ¶itun kanatar~…ĺ. kamu nu ma ¶itun masauŇčaj i saj…ôrw…ôija,ar…ôpanija,pao ¶jar~…ĺija,sir~…ĺa,s…ôrow…ôinija,k…ôr~…ĺoajsija,atu itiza i satipan-o ¶o,saamisan-amir~…ĺika, atu aotar~…ĺija, musakamu nu ma ¶itun a bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw. maka *** a maŇč a tad…ômaw musakamu tu kamu nu ma ¶itun. kamu nu ma ¶itun misauŇčaj tu sur~…ĺit-ba ¶u nu saj…ôrw…ôija-sir~…ĺi…ôr. u sar~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a kamu nu jino . ajzaaj a kamu nu ma ¶itun ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu naajawaj a kamu nu ma ¶itun. tuzuma i sa , mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kamu nu pa ¶jar~…ĺija sa tu taw. u sur~…ĺit nu kamu nu ma ¶itun uzuma musakamu tunijan a kamu kja kanatar~…ĺ atu subar~…ĺ: ma ¶itun,arpanija,pao ¶jar~…ĺija,sir~…ĺa subar~…ĺ: par…ôkan paŇčkiw-subar~…ĺ musakamuaj a tad…ômaw: *******-******* a tad…ômaw u ba ¶u nu kamu: iso***-*-mk; iso***-*-ma ¶,mkd; iso***-*-mkd mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan wikipajk…ô kamu nu ma ¶itun-**** wikipajk…ô kamu nu ma ¶itun-ma ¶…ôdonian r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô(amir~…ĺika a kamu) …ôtńßnor~…ĺogu…ô r…ôport for ma ¶…ôdonian bb ¶ …ôdu ¶ation - r~…ĺaŇčuag…ôs: ma ¶…ôdonian, mak…ôdonski tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô *…ôadiŇč and pronoun ¶iŇč ma ¶…ôdonian: an int…ôra ¶ti*…ô tutoriar~…ĺ otto kronst…ôin…ôr. tńß…ô ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺaps…ô of jugosr~…ĺa*ia and tńß…ô futur…ô prosp…ô ¶ts of tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian r~…ĺit…ôrarj r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô u ¶r~…ĺa r~…ĺaŇčuag…ô mat…ôriar~…ĺs proj…ô ¶t krst…ô misirko* - za mak…ôdon ¶kit…ô *aboti
